prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Detemir 20units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 46.3 kg; Height 152.1 cm; BMI 20.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.7%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 310mg/dL; 9 months ago 320mg/dL; 6 months ago 256mg/dL; 3 months ago 263mg/dL; current 244mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 45.2kg; 9 months ago 45.2kg; 6 months ago 44.8kg; 3 months ago 44.8kg; current 46.3kg), Height (12 months ago 152.1cm; 9 months ago 152.1cm; 6 months ago 152.1cm; 3 months ago 152.1cm; current 152.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 70U/L; 9 months ago 64U/L; 6 months ago 62U/L; 3 months ago 71U/L; current 67U/L), AST (12 months ago 43U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 34U/L; current 38U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 73mg/g; 9 months ago 75mg/g; 6 months ago 59mg/g; 3 months ago 83mg/g; current 76mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 34mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 34mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 166mg/dL; 6 months ago 189mg/dL; 3 months ago 168mg/dL; current 178mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 9.7g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 9.3g/dL; 3 months ago 9.1g/dL; current 9.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.89 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
